title: Lines should not be too long
description: Lines should not be too longAnalyze your codeconsistency-formattedmaintainabilityCode SmellconventionWhy is this an issue?Scrolling horizontally to see a full line of code lowers the code readability.Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIAvailable Since9.1Analyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since9.1©2025SonarSource Sàrl. All rights reserved.Privacy Policy|Cookie Policy|Terms of Use
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

logic.reasoning: Detects lines exceeding maximum length (120 characters). Long lines reduce code readability and require horizontal scrolling. Uses custom function to check each line and properly exclude comments, using directives, and URLs.

should_detect: public void ProcessData(string parameter1, string parameter2, string parameter3, string parameter4, string parameter5, string parameter6, string parameter7)
var result = SomeVeryLongMethodName(parameter1, parameter2, parameter3, parameter4, parameter5, parameter6, parameter7, additionalParameter1, additionalParameter2);
should_not_detect: public void ProcessData(string p1, string p2)
// This is a very long comment that exceeds 120 characters but should be excluded
